name: Saskatoon Pie
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Saskatoon berries (also known as Serviceberries in the US)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, simmer saskatoon berries in water for 10 minutes.
2. Add lemon juice. Stir in sugar mixed with flour.
3. Pour mixture into pastry-lined pie plate.
4. Dot with butter. Cover with top crust; seal and flute edges.
5. Reduce heat to 350°F and bake for 35-45 minutes, or until golden brown.
